feedback: The text provides a good overview of what will be covered in each section, including historical context, digitalization era, modern approaches, and tools used. However, it could benefit from more specific details about the content of each section.

feedback: The text gives a clear sense of the chronological and thematic progression of the thesis, from historical methods to modern tools. It effectively outlines the general structure by highlighting key periods and approaches.
